reasoning: The control CA-7 (4) focuses on continuous monitoring and risk monitoring, which can be mapped to Kubernetes through audit logging and monitoring of configuration changes. Kubernetes audit logging can be configured to capture changes to resources, including network policies and admission controllers, which aligns with the continuous monitoring aspect of the control. Additionally, ensuring audit logs are retained for a specific period supports risk monitoring by allowing historical analysis of changes.
title: Continuous Monitoring | Risk Monitoring
